channel.title: 2023-11 on LIVING NOW
channel.description: Recent content in 2023-11 on LIVING NOW

item.title: Dynamic programming
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description:
The essential idea of dynamic programming is to save the result for future use.

For example, if I have already know 1+2+3 equals 6 and saved the result at a place, then when I have to calculate 1+2+3+4, I just have to calculate 6+4 instead of going from scratch.

item.title: Who should be the manager
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description: I watched “Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse” today. It is an entertaining film. Excellent video effects, and, especially, the surprising but wonderful combination of various versions of spider-men based on the Spider-Verse theory. I was not surprised to find that the audience could not help to shout “WOW” when different kinds of spider-men, say, Lego spider-man, real world spider-man, and so on, showed rightly on the big screen.

item.title: What I will post on my blog
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description: I have finished building my personal blog recently and now any post can be smoothly published. So immediately the next comes to me is what will I post on my blog? change a word.

item.title: I do not need to go through it again
item.author: GIGKOMUSIC@gmail.com (GIGKO)
item.description: If I had a chance to lead a new life in my high school time, what would I do? Such a question came to me today when I was playing Persona 4 Golden and reading a detective story called “体育館の殺人” by 青崎有吾.
